verbatim: Employment for 25 lakh people: Starting from IT and tourism sectors and electronics 10 lakh job opportunities will be created for educated young men and women in modern industrial sectors in five years. The target is 15 lakh job opportunities in sectors like agriculture, construction, commerce and small scale industries. To prepare young men and women for jobs in modern sectors, 10 lakh people will be trained through skill development and career guidance.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.
Launch of the Kerala Knowledge Mission by K-DISC, expected to create 20 lakh jobs in five years by connecting trained youth with the global job market

A special financial package will be brought for start-ups started by SC-ST categories.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: One crore additional square feet of IT parks: The area of ​​IT parks in Kerala will be increased from 1.3 crore square feet to 2.3 crore square feet. This will provide direct employment to 2.5 lakh people.

verbatim: The number of foreign tourists will be doubled: The number of foreign tourists coming to Kerala will be increased from 12 lakh to 24 lakh in five years. The number of domestic tourists will be increased by 25 percent. This will generate employment for 4 lakh people.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Completion of natural gas pipeline: The gas pipeline has been completed. The Kochi Natural Gas Terminal will be connected to the national gas grid. This will boost thermal energy-based industries and increase the availability of domestic cooking gas.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Development of Electronic Hardware Industry: Keltron will be revived. Amballur Electronic Hardware Park will be completed. Kerala will be made a national hub in this sector.

verbatim: Value-added industries: An industrial chain will be formed under the auspices of farmer producer companies to manufacture value-added products from agricultural resources such as coconut, rubber, and spices. updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Agricultural Income Guarantee Scheme: A scheme to ensure minimum income for farmers will be launched. This will be implemented as a joint Central-State scheme. Royalty will be given for paddy fields. More money will be allocated for agriculture.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Other major projects: Projects like Vizhinjam Harbor, small ports like Azhikkal, Beypore, Ponnani, Thankassery, Light Metro, Kannur Airport, Kochi Metro, Smart City will be completed in a timely manner.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Electricity generation: Generation capacity will be achieved through a 1200 MW thermal power plant, 300 MW hydropower, and 1000 MW solar power. A public campaign will be launched to convert all bulbs in the state to LED and increase electricity efficiency.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: 12. Water Security Campaign: A massive campaign will be launched for water security. Comprehensive soil and water conser
verbatim: 12. Water Security Campaign: A massive campaign will be launched for water security. Comprehensive soil and water conservation measures will be devised from micro-watershed to river basin. A permanent task force will be formed to review inter-state river water agreements in a timely and appropriate manner.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Food Security: Self-sufficiency in vegetables, eggs and milk will be achieved. Paddy cultivation will be expanded to three lakh hectares through the 'Arisree' project. Strict conditions will be imposed to prevent adulteration of food items and ensure quality.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Coastal Package: The first priority of the Rs 5000 crore coastal package is the development of coastal infrastructure. Along with this, the 'Model Fishing Village' project will be implemented to bring social welfare indicators at par with the state standard.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Protection of traditional industries: Traditional industries like coir, handloom, palm oil, khadi, cashew, and cotton will be modernized by protecting jobs. The government will purchase and procure the production of artisans in sectors like cloth, coir, and handicrafts by ensuring minimum wages. A special department will be started for traditional industries.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Road Development: National Highways will be made four-lane. State Highways and District Roads will be renovated and constructed in BM & BC. Rural roads will be included in the one-time renovation project. All bypasses will be completed. Smart Road Project will be implemented in Kerala in phases.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Waterways: National waterways will be completed. Waterway construction will be completed. Waterborne freight transport will begin by connecting the ports of Kerala. A study will be conducted to start a high-speed ferry service from Thiruvananthapuram to Kasaragod.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Railways: Pressure will be exerted to complete specific new railway lines. Efforts will be made to prepare the doubling line for running high-speed trains.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Clean Kerala: Kerala will be made the cleanest state in India. For this, priority will be given to source-based waste treatment. Action will be taken against water pollution. A public campaign will be launched for this.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Housing: All landless people will be provided with at least a bed. The EMS Housing Scheme and the MN Lakhs Veedu Scheme will be revived and a house and toilet will be ensured to everyone within five years. One acre of agricultural land will be provided to the tribals. The Land Reforms Act will be protected.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Health Sector: The existing staffing pattern will be reviewed and the number of doctors and nurses will be doubled. Comprehensive and universal insurance will be implemented in conjunction with the public health system. Three medical colleges will be upgraded to AIIMS standards. Facilities for heart surgery and cathlab will be established in taluk hospitals. Cancer screening system will be set up in taluk hospitals.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Ayurveda: An Ayurveda University will be established. A state-of-the-art laboratory and research center will be established with an investment of Rs. 500 crore. Infrastructure will be provided in the Ayurveda sector, linking healthcare and tourism.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: School education to international standards: Classes 8 to 12 Schools will be made high-tech. With the cooperation of alu
verbatim: School education to international standards: Classes 8 to 12 Schools will be made high-tech. With the cooperation of alumni and well-wishers, 1000 public schools will be upgraded to international standards.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Centers of Excellence: University centers will be transformed into centers of excellence. Social enterprises such as coo
verbatim: Centers of Excellence: University centers will be transformed into centers of excellence. Social enterprises such as cooperatives and trusts will expand the higher education sector in collaboration with the government.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Welfare of Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes: Full power will be ensured to the village communities in project plann
verbatim: Welfare of Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes: Full power will be ensured to the village communities in project planning. Supervision powers will also be given. Supervision committees will be formed at all levels regarding the disbursement of the Scheduled Caste Development Fund. It will be made mandatory for local government institutions to incorporate the suggestions raised by the Scheduled Castes at the Gram Sabha/Development Seminar/Working Committee levels.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Women's empowerment: A special department for women will be started. Genter budgeting will be restored. Kudumbashree will be transformed into a sub-unit of Gram Sabhas. Loans will be guaranteed to Kudumbashree at four percent interest.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: People's Planning: The second version of People's Planning will be launched. This will be a people's movement integrating watershed planning, waste management, and organic vegetables with the employment guarantee scheme and Kudumbashree.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Cultural Renaissance: The budget allocation for the cultural sector will be significantly increased. It will be ensured that one percent of the education budget will be given as a grant to libraries. Libraries will be digitized. Financial assistance will be provided to arts & sports clubs. Facilities will be created for children to practice all arts on a school cluster basis.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Environment-friendly Kerala: Watershed-based projects will be prepared with public participation to protect soil, water
verbatim: Environment-friendly Kerala: Watershed-based projects will be prepared with public participation to protect soil, water and biodiversity. The Wetlands Act will be strictly implemented. A master plan will be prepared and implemented to purify water bodies.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Expatriates: Expatriate Development Fund will be launched. Investments made in this fund Expatriates will be eligible for employment in the industries started using the technology when they return, if they have the qualifications. An extensive rehabilitation plan will be devised for those who return.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Public Distribution: Public distribution will be strengthened. Closed fair price shops will be opened. Prices will not b
verbatim: Public Distribution: Public distribution will be strengthened. Closed fair price shops will be opened. Prices will not be increased in Civil Supplies and Consumer Fed shops for the next five years.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Hunger-free Kerala: There is not a single person in Kerala who has not eaten at least once a day. A scheme will be launc
verbatim: Hunger-free Kerala: There is not a single person in Kerala who has not eaten at least once a day. A scheme will be launched in selected areas to provide free midday meals to those in need by collaborating with voluntary organizations and others. This will be extended throughout Kerala. A network of hotels will be created that provide good food at reasonable prices.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Raising Social Security Pensions to ₹1000, Ensuring Timely Monthly Delivery, and Providing Universal Health Insurance
verbatim: Social Security Pension: All pensions to be Rs 1000 from June 1 Will be increased. Pension will be provided to all eligible persons above the age of 60. It will be increased in a timely manner every year. Pension will be delivered to the home every month without any arrears. Complete health insurance will be made available to all.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

Enhancement of the minimum pension under the social security pension scheme to ₹1,000 per month with effect from June 2016, as announced in the 2016-17 revised budget. The universal health insurance was fulfilled in 2019 by launching KASP

title_en: Kerala's Bank: A large bank of Kerala will be formed by merging the district and state cooperative banks. There will be
verbatim: Kerala's Bank: A large bank of Kerala will be formed by merging the district and state cooperative banks. There will be a two-tier system in the cooperative sector.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Will put an end to corruption; ensure good governance: Second Administrative Reforms Commission recommendations will be
verbatim: Will put an end to corruption; ensure good governance: Second Administrative Reforms Commission recommendations will be implemented. E-governance will be made effective. All complaints and issues will be resolved at the government level within 30 days. If complaints or requirements are rejected, a system with public participation will be created to review them and clarify them. The secretariat-based system will be replaced with a decentralized and effective system based on the directorate system like the central government. This will be implemented while protecting the rights of employees. Service centers will be established to provide all government services through a single window. The Right to Information Act will be implemented effectively.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Self-sufficiency in vegetables will be achieved. For this, a mass campaign focusing on organic vegetables will be launched. Organic vegetable cultivation will be started in 50,000 hectares. Minimum price will be paid for vegetables through farmers' producer companies and Horticulture Corporation. Chiller storages will be set up for storage in vegetable production centers.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Clusters of homestead neighborhoods will be formed for the development of integrated multi-crop homestead farming, and t
verbatim: Clusters of homestead neighborhoods will be formed for the development of integrated multi-crop homestead farming, and the distribution of means of production, small-scale mechanization, and plant protection activities will be made more efficient. Urban agriculture will be encouraged.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The area of ​​rice cultivation will be increased to 3 lakh hectares. Production will be increased to 10 lakh tonnes. Panchayats will be given the authority to take over the fallow fields bought by real estate agents and cultivate them through farmer groups. Group farming will be encouraged. Multi-level participatory farming system will be introduced in rice cultivation. Rice Bio Park will be established.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Remunerative prices will be ensured for all agricultural products. The procurement price of paddy will be increased in l
verbatim: Remunerative prices will be ensured for all agricultural products. The procurement price of paddy will be increased in line with the cost of production. Farmers will be provided with money within a week by linking up with agricultural cooperatives.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Protecting paddy fields, which are natural water reservoirs, will be considered as a natural ecosystem and royalty will
verbatim: Protecting paddy fields, which are natural water reservoirs, will be considered as a natural ecosystem and royalty will be given to the land owners according to the area. Paddy fields will be declared as protected paddy areas in the state while protecting the rights of the owners. Due to the special nature of the topography of Kerala, watershed-based planning is essential for agricultural development. For this, the necessary water reservoirs, water drainage channels and soil protection structures should be created and maintained. For this, the employment guarantee scheme will be used on a large scale. Thus, 100 days of employment will be ensured.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Investment in agriculture will be increased. Government expenditure on agriculture has been 3-5 percent of state income for the last two decades. At the all-India level, it is 6-10 percent. The earlier requirement of minimum production area allocation in local government schemes will be restored. Public investment will be increased to 10 percent. Comprehensive diversification of farms and mechanization where necessary will be implemented.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Value Added Products of Kerala (Parks) will be established to protect the crops of the state and protect the farmers. Companies that manufacture value added products will be established in all possible sectors. Youth entering the agricultural sector will be trained and encouraged according to their abilities.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The functioning of the Farmers Welfare Board will be made a reality. The Farmers Provident Fund concept will be implemented and ESI model treatment will be provided to the farmers who become its members. A special scheme will be introduced to protect the families of farmers who commit suicide.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: In order to make the agricultural labor sector more attractive, assistance will be ensured for those who are engaged in fixed-day work, income, health care, and education of children. Training should be provided to laborers in modern farming techniques. Agencies like Haritha Sena and Labor Bank will be formed in every panchayat to provide better services to farmers and to directly farm if needed. Steps will be taken to resolve the problems of coconut climbing laborers.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Restoration projects to remove coconut trees that are very low in productivity due to old age, disease and pest infestation and plant seedlings of improved varieties will be implemented in all major districts of the state in collaboration with the Coconut Development Board.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: To promote coconut product value addition and diversification initiatives led by coconut farmers' groups, coconut parks will be started in all districts under the auspices of coconut producer federations and producer companies. Not only coconut milk and coconut oil, but also value-added products from them will be produced in these parks. The procurement price will be revised in a timely manner in relation to the cost of production.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Limited mechanization has been implemented in the paddy cultivation sector. The necessary machinery for other crops is y
verbatim: Limited mechanization has been implemented in the paddy cultivation sector. The necessary machinery for other crops is yet to be found. Suitable ploughing and harvesting machinery is not available for the Pokkali fields. Mechanization in the agricultural sector will be implemented on a war footing after discussing with the labour unions. Agro service centres will be started on a block basis.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The financial crisis at the Agricultural University is adversely affecting research and extension activities. The univer
verbatim: The financial crisis at the Agricultural University is adversely affecting research and extension activities. The university will undergo a comprehensive reorganization.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Integrated farming methods including fish farming/duck farming etc. will be promoted.
verbatim: Integrated farming methods including fish farming/duck farming etc. will be promoted.

verbatim: Existing soil testing and water testing labs will be strengthened and labs capable of testing micronutrients will be expanded in all districts. Intensive cultivation will be promoted to increase the production of indigenous fruit trees.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Possible surplus land and plantation land in violation of lease agreements will be acquired and distributed to the landless immediately. The Forest Rights Act will be vigorously implemented to ensure agricultural land for tribals.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Honey villages will be established as part of the initiative to increase farmers' income by promoting beekeeping. This will not only create more employment opportunities but will also increase the production of crops pollinated by bees. Mushroom cultivation and floriculture will be promoted.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Loan facilities for the agricultural sector will be increased. Interest-free loans will be made available to rice farmers and vegetable growers.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Efficient management and proper supervision of public sector enterprises in the agricultural sector will be ensured. Steps will be taken to streamline the management system and make it run efficiently in a professional manner.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Agriculture will be made a part of the school syllabus. A system will be created to operate it in collaboration with the
verbatim: Agriculture will be made a part of the school syllabus. A system will be created to operate it in collaboration with the Department of Agriculture and the Animal and Soil Conservation Department.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A system will be created to scientifically monitor the toxicity of vegetables. If, for any reason, vegetables containing
verbatim: A system will be created to scientifically monitor the toxicity of vegetables. If, for any reason, vegetables containing toxic substances are found, strict action will be taken.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Value-added factories will be allowed to use the brand name 'Made in God's Own Country Kerala'. Efforts will be made to
verbatim: Value-added factories will be allowed to use the brand name 'Made in God's Own Country Kerala'. Efforts will be made to intervene in the rubber sector on the Amul model.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Along with protecting wild animals, steps will also be taken to protect agriculture from their attacks. Compensation wil
verbatim: Along with protecting wild animals, steps will also be taken to protect agriculture from their attacks. Compensation will be provided for crop damage.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The replanting subsidy for rubber will be increased to Rs. 1 lakh per hectare. The subsidy will be provided on a per acr
verbatim: The replanting subsidy for rubber will be increased to Rs. 1 lakh per hectare. The subsidy will be provided on a per acre basis to ensure income to rubber farmers, linked to the price. Strong pressure will be exerted on the Central Government for this. If necessary, the State Government itself will take the initiative for a massive popular agitation. The State Government will also bear a part of the burden of this subsidy.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Pressure will be exerted on the central government to declare rubber latex and rubber sheet as agricultural products. In
verbatim: Pressure will be exerted on the central government to declare rubber latex and rubber sheet as agricultural products. Intervention will be made to control rubber imports. Special industrial parks will be established for this. Rubber trees will be exempted from sales tax for three years.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Efforts should be made to increase the popularity and demand for horticultural products. The use of rubber in road construction and other construction activities will be increased. Steps will be taken to start a large-scale rubber industry in Kerala.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The main problem in the plantation sector is old trees. These need to be replanted urgently. An effective way to do this
verbatim: The main problem in the plantation sector is old trees. These need to be replanted urgently. An effective way to do this is to use the employment guarantee scheme for this. However, permission has been denied as this is considered a repetitive farming activity. The government will take the initiative to correct this.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A systematic effort is needed to conserve soil and water and maintain biodiversity in the plantation sector. Biodiversit
verbatim: A systematic effort is needed to conserve soil and water and maintain biodiversity in the plantation sector. Biodiversity must be protected. A comprehensive program for this will be prepared at the local level.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The potential for afforestation should be utilized to the maximum. A scheme will be devised to provide a fixed amount of
verbatim: The potential for afforestation should be utilized to the maximum. A scheme will be devised to provide a fixed amount of money for each type of tree from cooperative banks as a monthly long-term loan against the security of the tree. The bank loan and interest will only need to be paid at the time of felling the tree.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In the name of falling prices, large plantation owners cannot be allowed to cut wages and other benefits of workers. Cut
verbatim: In the name of falling prices, large plantation owners cannot be allowed to cut wages and other benefits of workers. Cutting wages and benefits is not a solution to the crisis. Alternative ways can only be found to increase productivity. Minimum living facilities will be ensured for plantation workers. A special housing scheme will be implemented. Special schemes will be formulated through local government institutions for this. All plantation workers will be considered as BPL and ration and other benefits will be provided.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Strict action will be taken against large plantation owners who have illegally occupied land and encroached on governmen
verbatim: Strict action will be taken against large plantation owners who have illegally occupied land and encroached on government land. Such land in their possession will be used for public purposes and distributed to the landless.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: All migrant farmers who migrated before 01.01.1977 will be given unconditional title deeds up to four acres of land for which joint verification of the Revenue and Forest Departments has been completed. updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: In the areas notified as Environmentally Sensitive Areas (ESA) in connection with the Kasturirangan report, settlements, agricultural lands and plantations will be excluded. The UDF government will make the necessary changes in the documents submitted to the Union Ministry of Forests and Environment for this.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Self-sufficiency in milk production will be achieved. For this, Milma's operations will be reorganized on the original Anand model. More financial assistance will be provided to dairy welfare societies on the basis of schemes.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The cattle rearing scheme will be made universal. The "Kudumbashree Pashu, Aad Gramam" schemes will be strengthened.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Shortage of milkmen is a major problem. It is necessary to improve milking machines in a manner that will facilitate milking in small units. Mobile milking units will be encouraged under dairy cooperatives.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

Pressure will be exerted on the central government to include cattle rearing in the employment guarantee scheme.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Scientific models of modern slaughterhouses of various sizes will be prepared and suitable ones will be installed in all
verbatim: Scientific models of modern slaughterhouses of various sizes will be prepared and suitable ones will be installed in all municipalities and panchayats in a timely manner.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Farmers' income can be increased by diversifying through value-added products.
verbatim: Farmers' income can be increased by diversifying through value-added products.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Strict quality control of products including milk coming from other states will be implemented. In Kerala, in addition t
verbatim: Strict quality control of products including milk coming from other states will be implemented. In Kerala, in addition to Milma, producer companies will be started under the leadership of model dairy cooperatives. They will exclusively manufacture value-added milk products.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Steps should be taken to reduce the poaching of hatchery owners from other states in the poultry sector. A good number of farmers in Kerala also work on contract basis for outside vendors. The Poultry Development Corporation's involvement in this sector will be further strengthened.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: A large-scale chicken feed factory will be set up in Kerala. Meat waste and fish waste from our cities can be used as raw materials. Experiences from foreign countries show that such a factory can be operated without causing pollution.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Employment opportunities will be increased in pet bird breeding, commercial dog breeding, training, farm tourism, etc. W
verbatim: Employment opportunities will be increased in pet bird breeding, commercial dog breeding, training, farm tourism, etc. When commercial breeding of pet birds and dogs is carried out on a large scale in a decentralized manner, a market should be ensured. For this, online marketing sites will be started.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The poultry farming scheme will be expanded through the project "Earning along with education" focusing on schools in th
verbatim: The poultry farming scheme will be expanded through the project "Earning along with education" focusing on schools in the state. Large-scale poultry farming will be promoted in open areas by creating safe enclosures in rubber plantations. The Chicken Village project will be expanded.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: ​​Steps will be taken to instruct banks to treat loans for the animal husbandry sector as agricultural loans. Government
verbatim: ​​Steps will be taken to instruct banks to treat loans for the animal husbandry sector as agricultural loans. Government expenditure on the animal husbandry sector will be increased to one percent of the state revenue.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Comprehensive insurance will be ensured for cattle. There are farmers who are in debt and facing foreclosure proceedings
verbatim: Comprehensive insurance will be ensured for cattle. There are farmers who are in debt and facing foreclosure proceedings as a result of the death of cattle provided by local government institutions and the drying up of milk. A scheme will be formulated to help them. Interventions will be made to protect and give importance to India's unique breeds. A health card scheme will be implemented for all cattle.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Just as land reform was introduced in the agricultural sector and agricultural land was distributed to farmers, a compre
verbatim: Just as land reform was introduced in the agricultural sector and agricultural land was distributed to farmers, a comprehensive water reform law will be formulated and implemented in the fisheries sector that will ensure the rights of the sea to the fishermen who fish in the sea. Thereby, the ownership of fishing equipment, the ownership of fish resources in the sea, and the right of access to the sea will be restricted to the fishermen only, and the first sale right of the raw fish caught will be reserved exclusively to the fishermen.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The existing laws and regulations related to fisheries are not sufficient to ensure the sustainability of fish stocks. I
verbatim: The existing laws and regulations related to fisheries are not sufficient to ensure the sustainability of fish stocks. In order to maintain the coastal fish stocks of Kerala at a sustainable level based on the Code of Conduct for Responsible Fisheries (CCRF) of 1995, timely amendments will be made to the KMFR Act of 1980 with emphasis on participatory resource management and control. Pressure will be exerted on the Central Government to eliminate the practice of fishing by foreign trawlers.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Participatory resource management policies and action plans will be formulated with the participation of all stakeholder
verbatim: Participatory resource management policies and action plans will be formulated with the participation of all stakeholders related to the fisheries sector, including fishermen, allied workers, boat owners, officials, scientists, voluntary organizations, etc. Fisheries Resource Management Councils will be formed at the local, district and state levels.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The monsoon fishing ban will continue to be enforced.
verbatim: The monsoon fishing ban will continue to be enforced.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Pressure will be exerted to implement the recommendations of the Murari Committee. Integrated plans will be implemented
verbatim: Pressure will be exerted to implement the recommendations of the Murari Committee. Integrated plans will be implemented for the protection of endangered indigenous fish species. Fish seeds will be deposited on a large scale in public water bodies. Natural breeding habitats of fish will be protected.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: As an alternative measure to combat the encroachment of foreign vessels in the LOP scheme in the deep sea fishing sector
verbatim: As an alternative measure to combat the encroachment of foreign vessels in the LOP scheme in the deep sea fishing sector, subsidies and generous loan policies will be introduced and implemented to provide expert training in deep sea fishing to fishermen's cooperative societies, to modernize local vessels engaged in deep sea fishing, and to acquire new vessels.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Sea wall construction will be expanded on a war footing. Fishermen living in areas threatened by sea erosion will be provided financial assistance of Rs. 10 lakh each to relocate to a suitable safe area while retaining their existing land rights, if they are interested. The income from wind turbines etc. installed on the land along the coast will also go to the fishermen. Fishermen's houses will be exempted from CR EZ and temporary numbers will be given.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: To increase income in the fisheries sector, infrastructure will be provided to process fish into value-added products an
verbatim: To increase income in the fisheries sector, infrastructure will be provided to process fish into value-added products and bring about diversification with the help of new technologies, and new employment opportunities will be created for women fishermen in that sector through skill development.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Fishing harbors, landing centers, fish markets and coastal roads connecting them to the national highway will be develop
verbatim: Fishing harbors, landing centers, fish markets and coastal roads connecting them to the national highway will be developed and protected with quality standards. New harbors should be approved as part of a comprehensive coastal management plan. Modernization will be strengthened.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Harbour Management Societies will be formed with the participation of fishermen for the management of fishing harbours.
verbatim: Harbour Management Societies will be formed with the participation of fishermen for the management of fishing harbours. Cold storage facilities will be provided in fishing harbours. Fishing ports will be modernised and infrastructure will be provided there.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A comprehensive maritime safety package will be developed in the fisheries sector, utilizing the potential of ICT, to en
verbatim: A comprehensive maritime safety package will be developed in the fisheries sector, utilizing the potential of ICT, to ensure maritime safety for fishing workers in hazardous conditions.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The activities of the fisheries welfare groups will be reorganized.
verbatim: The activities of the fisheries welfare groups will be reorganized.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The distribution of land titles to fishermen will be completed in a timely manner.
verbatim: The distribution of land titles to fishermen will be completed in a timely manner.

title_en: The benefits of social security schemes will be made available to all fishermen, regardless of APL-BPL.
verbatim: The benefits of social security schemes will be made available to all fishermen, regardless of APL-BPL.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The financial crisis of the Welfare Fund Board will be resolved by removing the existing obstacles to collecting contributions from exporters to the Welfare Fund.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The decision taken by the previous LDF government to increase the benefit of the Savings Relief Scheme to Rs. 3600 will be implemented immediately.

verbatim: To solve the housing problem in the fisheries sector, a comprehensive coastal housing plan will be formulated and implemented to ensure housing, sanitation and toilet facilities, drinking water, electricity and a healthy environment for all. The model fishing village project will be re-imagined. A priority list of minimum facilities to be provided in the fishing village will be prepared and ensured. The cost of construction of houses for fishermen will be revised based on the seasonal increase in construction costs. Interventions will be made to remove legal obstacles to the construction of houses for fishermen.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

The government will fully bear the educational expenses of the children of fishermen studying in self-financing colleges. All educational benefits for the Scheduled Castes will be made available to the children of fishermen. Taking into account the financial situation of the families of fishermen, interventions will be made to allow the BPL criteria.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The debt relief measures introduced by the LDF government to free fishermen from debt will be completed.
verbatim: The debt relief measures introduced by the LDF government to free fishermen from debt will be completed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Insurance will also be provided for work equipment. Insurance benefits will be increased.

verbatim: Appropriate rehabilitation and adequate compensation will be ensured for the fishermen who will lose their jobs, livelihoods and habitat through the implementation of the Vizhinjam Port Project. The same action will be taken in areas where such issues arise in connection with port renovation.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The Matsya Keralam project will be revived. The aim is to double the inland fish supply in five years. Not only ponds and dams, but also integrated fish farming in fields will be promoted. verbatim: Measures will be taken to utilize scientific technologies to prevent pollution. Pollution control will be ensured in industrial establishments.

Projects will be formulated with the help of local government institutions to protect all types of water bodies and ancient buildings.

verbatim: No encroachment of any kind will be allowed. The core areas of the forest areas will be maintained as untouched inner forests. Local self-government institutions and the local community will be involved in protecting the existing forest areas.

verbatim: Agroforestry will be implemented outside the forest to meet the demand for timber. The Forest Rights Act will be strictly enforced and the right of tribals to collect and sell non-timber forest resources will be ensured.

verbatim: The Coastal Management Act will be revised to take into account the problems of fishermen. The functioning of the Coastal Authority will be decentralized. It will be ensured that their functioning will be transparent.

verbatim: The second coir restructuring scheme will be formulated. Under the auspices of coir groups and coconut production producer companies, at least 30 percent of the husks in Kerala will be collected and used to produce coir. Necessary subsidy will be provided for this.

verbatim: Coirfed and Coir Corporation will purchase coir produced by the groups by ensuring minimum wages. The government will bear the loss incurred when selling this coir to exporters, domestic traders and industrialists. This will ensure the income of the artisans.

verbatim: Along with the foreign market, the domestic market is also important today. The "One Coir Product in Every Home" campaign launched by the LDF government has received great encouragement. verbatim: The industry cannot be sustained without increasing domestic production of cashew nuts in Kerala. For this, high-yielding and non-stalky cashew varieties will be promoted.

verbatim: Special incentives will be given for planting low-growing hybrid coconut trees suitable for the chethu industry. verbatim: A scheme called 'Market Kerala' will be introduced to ensure a market for the state's unique traditional products. Arrangements will be made to sell products from Kerala abroad and domestically. Through this, markets will be found for Kerala's products both globally and domestically.

verbatim: Traditional industrial products will be made mandatory at least on a minimum scale in heritage hotels that receive benefits and concessions related to tourism development.

verbatim: In view of the abundant availability of low cost natural gas from the Kochi Natural Gas Terminal, a methanol plant, chlorine compounds, petrochemical products, gas-fired power plants and city gas projects will be implemented. verbatim: A system will be created to provide 10 lakh new job opportunities through skill development and career guidance. verbatim: Clusters of small and medium scale industries will be established in suitable industrial areas in all districts. verbatim: Loans for small industries will be made available at subsidized interest rates. Kerala Financial Corporation will be transformed into an agency for this.

verbatim: A law will be brought that black sand, another asset of Kerala, can only be exported outside Kerala as value-added goods. verbatim: A special program will be developed to encourage entrepreneurs. Financial assistance and incentives for start-up companies will be increased. A state innovation policy will be formulated. verbatim: Essential commodities like sand and stone are the wealth of the country. verbatim: Above all, a strong stance will be taken against monopoly policies that unilaterally raise the prices of cement, steel, paints, etc. without relating them to production costs.

verbatim: Kerala Institute of Retail Management will be established. It will be established for the purpose of training entrepreneurship and modern management experts in the retail sector.

verbatim: A Trade Mission will be established. The Trade Mission will act as the nodal agency of the government in this area. verbatim: A new brand called Kerala Retail needs to be created. The necessary promotion for this should be done in connection with tourism. The aim of this brand promotion is to create an attractive image of the commercial sector in Kerala.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: In addition to the exemption given by the central government to the institutions falling under the scope of Start-up India, the state will provide one more year of exemption. Green cards will be given to honest businessmen.

verbatim: These institutions should also acquire the capacity to compete in the global market. verbatim: Corruption in the public sector arises in connection with buying and selling. Based on the AG's reports and rapid investigations in this regard, a general policy will be formulated to ensure transparency.

verbatim: The government will provide financial assistance to develop the Kerala Tourism Mart into the world's most important tourism business meet.

verbatim: We should further enhance our presence in international tourism fairs. Appropriate incentives will be provided to the private sector to participate in such fairs.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Taxes affecting the tourism sector will be reviewed. With the introduction of the Goods and Services Tax, the luxury tax
verbatim: Taxes affecting the tourism sector will be reviewed. With the introduction of the Goods and Services Tax, the luxury tax will be abolished.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The government budget allocation for tourism will be significantly increased. Considering the employment potential of th
verbatim: The government budget allocation for tourism will be significantly increased. Considering the employment potential of the tourism sector, a certain percentage of the resources collected from this sector will be invested in the development of this sector itself.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: KTDC is the most important direct development agency of the government. The first thing KTDC needs is a professional boa
verbatim: KTDC is the most important direct development agency of the government. The first thing KTDC needs is a professional board and management. The functioning of KTDC will be radically reformed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Tourism in Kerala requires at least one lakh new people every year in tourism-related fields. But only about 15,000 peop
verbatim: Tourism in Kerala requires at least one lakh new people every year in tourism-related fields. But only about 15,000 people receive training. According to the current growth rate, we need additional human resources in the tourism sector every year. The number of children and training capacity in the existing institutions like KITTS, KIHMS and IHMCT will be increased. Self-financing training institutions are also coming up in this sector. A special system will be created to check and rate the curriculum and training. Special emphasis will be given to the training of tourist guides. Courses related to tourism will also be started in public arts and science colleges.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Responsible tourism policy will continue. Carrying capacity study of all tourism centers in Kerala will be conducted imm
verbatim: Responsible tourism policy will continue. Carrying capacity study of all tourism centers in Kerala will be conducted immediately. Local government representatives in tourism areas will be given focused training to prepare a sub-plan for tourism development.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A green protocol will be created for tourism centers. The use of disposable items will be minimized. Plastic will be ban
verbatim: A green protocol will be created for tourism centers. The use of disposable items will be minimized. Plastic will be banned. Modern public facilities will be established to process waste from houseboats.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A pilgrim tourism policy will be formulated linking pilgrimage centers and cultural heritage centers. Rural and urban cr
verbatim: A pilgrim tourism policy will be formulated linking pilgrimage centers and cultural heritage centers. Rural and urban craft fairs linking the craft industry with tourism will be organized as part of tourism. Farm tourism will be promoted.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: For the development of Ayurvedic tourism, a consortium of institutions working in this sector in Kerala will be formed a
verbatim: For the development of Ayurvedic tourism, a consortium of institutions working in this sector in Kerala will be formed and effectively promoted through travel agencies abroad.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Interventions will be made to develop the major cities of Kerala, such as Thiruvananthapuram, Ernakulam and Kozhikode, i
verbatim: Interventions will be made to develop the major cities of Kerala, such as Thiruvananthapuram, Ernakulam and Kozhikode, into metro cities. Steps will be taken to complete airports and metro systems in a timely manner. City improvement programs, junction renovation and bypasses will be implemented to ease urban traffic congestion.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Steps will be taken for the development of the capital, such as establishing a High Court bench in Thiruvananthapuram, d
verbatim: Steps will be taken for the development of the capital, such as establishing a High Court bench in Thiruvananthapuram, developing Nemom as a satellite terminal, developing Attukal Township, and resolving the water crisis.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A special package will be implemented for the development of Malabar, which has been backward due to historical reasons.
verbatim: A special package will be implemented for the development of Malabar, which has been backward due to historical reasons. Special consideration will be given to developmentally backward areas like Kasaragod and Wayanad.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The tourism circuit map does not include the major tourist destinations of North Kerala. International tour operators do
verbatim: The tourism circuit map does not include the major tourist destinations of North Kerala. International tour operators do not send tourists to North Kerala. This deficiency will be addressed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Electricity will be provided to all households by 2017. By rationalizing the operating costs of KSEB and the cost of pur
verbatim: Electricity will be provided to all households by 2017. By rationalizing the operating costs of KSEB and the cost of purchasing electricity, electricity will be ensured at affordable rates for all.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Intervention will be made to establish a coal power plant with a capacity of 1200-1320 MW while ensuring environmental p
verbatim: Intervention will be made to establish a coal power plant with a capacity of 1200-1320 MW while ensuring environmental protection. The socio-industrial development program in the project area will be taken up and implemented in parallel. If it is not possible in Kerala, it will be established in a coal mining area.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Efforts will be made for a fair natural gas contract. This will enable the Kochi LNG terminal to be operational and a po
verbatim: Efforts will be made for a fair natural gas contract. This will enable the Kochi LNG terminal to be operational and a power plant to be established at Brahmapuram, which is connected to the natural gas pipeline. Availability of natural gas will be ensured for the Kayamkulam power plant.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Renewable energy sources such as small hydropower projects, wind and solar power generation will be rapidly increased. B
verbatim: Renewable energy sources such as small hydropower projects, wind and solar power generation will be rapidly increased. By achieving an annual growth rate of 25 percent, it will be ensured that at least 10 percent of Kerala's total electricity requirement will come from these by 2020. For this, renewable electricity generation capacity will be increased to 1500 MW by 2020. Rooftop solar power plants, wasteland solar power plants, dam reservoirs and canals will be the main components of this program. Transmission losses will be reduced.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: An additional 500 MW of hydropower projects are targeted by 2021. Increasing the capacity of existing projects, implemen
verbatim: An additional 500 MW of hydropower projects are targeted by 2021. Increasing the capacity of existing projects, implementing new ones, rehabilitating the catchment area of ​​existing ones, and increasing storage capacity will all be part of this program.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The smart grid system will be implemented in phases to increase the reliability of the electricity distribution network
verbatim: The smart grid system will be implemented in phases to increase the reliability of the electricity distribution network and absorb volatile sources. The transmission network will be strengthened.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A public campaign will be organized to increase the energy efficiency of electricity and thereby influence demand. Energ
verbatim: A public campaign will be organized to increase the energy efficiency of electricity and thereby influence demand. Energy-efficient electrical appliances will be promoted. Even if many of these are given to the people free of charge, it will be profitable when the investment in the institutional capacity to generate the electricity saved from them is calculated. Energy audits will be conducted in all institutions to avoid waste.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Permission will be given to industrial enterprises for power plants on a captive basis on generous terms.
verbatim: Permission will be given to industrial enterprises for power plants on a captive basis on generous terms.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: NH-47 and NH-17 will be strengthened and widened to four-lane standards. MC Road renovation will be completed.
verbatim: NH-47 and NH-17 will be strengthened and widened to four-lane standards. MC Road renovation will be completed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: All state highways and district roads in Kerala will be upgraded to BM & BC roads. All incomplete bypasses and all railw
verbatim: All state highways and district roads in Kerala will be upgraded to BM & BC roads. All incomplete bypasses and all railway overpasses will be completed on a war footing. Tenders will be invited for these with maintenance contracts. Rubberized roads will be promoted.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The development of the hill highway from Thiruvananthapuram to Kasaragod, which was declared as a state highway by the p
verbatim: The development of the hill highway from Thiruvananthapuram to Kasaragod, which was declared as a state highway by the previous Left Front government, will be completed. The coastal highway from Ponnani to Kozhikode will also be completed at the earliest.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Systems will be devised to efficiently implement the maintenance and repair of highways and roads. If the concept of a g
verbatim: Systems will be devised to efficiently implement the maintenance and repair of highways and roads. If the concept of a government-owned mobile road repair unit is implemented, potholes on the road can be repaired quickly and thereby reduce accidents. Major roads will be tendered with long-term maintenance contract provisions.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Full compensation and rehabilitation package will be provided for land acquisition. A special company will be formed for
verbatim: Full compensation and rehabilitation package will be provided for land acquisition. A special company will be formed for this purpose and loans will be made available from the cooperative sector.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: By improving public transport, we will intervene to significantly reduce traffic congestion, accidents and environmental
verbatim: By improving public transport, we will intervene to significantly reduce traffic congestion, accidents and environmental pollution caused by the increase in private vehicles. We will gradually adopt environmentally friendly means of transport such as electric/battery-powered vehicles, CNG buses, metro/light rail systems, and MEMU services.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A comprehensive plan will be formulated and implemented for special lanes for cyclists and pedestrians, a network of par
verbatim: A comprehensive plan will be formulated and implemented for special lanes for cyclists and pedestrians, a network of parks, footover bridges, flyovers and subways. No road or bridge constructed by the state government will be toll-based. Illegal toll collection will be stopped.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A comprehensive restructuring package will be implemented, including the assumption of the debt burden of KSRTC. It will
verbatim: A comprehensive restructuring package will be implemented, including the assumption of the debt burden of KSRTC. It will be ensured that KSRTC employees receive their pensions on time. KSRTC routes will be protected.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Waterways and inland waterways will be renovated. National Waterway-3 (Kollam-Kottappuram) will be made fully operationa
verbatim: Waterways and inland waterways will be renovated. National Waterway-3 (Kollam-Kottappuram) will be made fully operational. An action plan will be formulated to increase the share of water transport in total transport from the current one percent to five percent within the next five years.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A waterborne cargo system will be started by connecting ports like Vizhinjam, Kochi, Ponnani, Beypore, Azhikode, Bekal e
verbatim: A waterborne cargo system will be started by connecting ports like Vizhinjam, Kochi, Ponnani, Beypore, Azhikode, Bekal etc. A study will be conducted to start a high-speed ferry service from Thiruvananthapuram to Kasaragod. If it is found to be feasible, it will be implemented expeditiously and provide a permanent solution to the existing traffic problem.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Central Government's announcement and further steps are required to implement the NW-3 expansion (Kollam-Vizhinjam,
verbatim: The Central Government's announcement and further steps are required to implement the NW-3 expansion (Kollam-Vizhinjam, Kottapuram-Kasargod). An action plan will be formulated for this.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Even those traveling with family members are being stopped and checked without provocation. To avoid this, the Smart Roa
verbatim: Even those traveling with family members are being stopped and checked without provocation. To avoid this, the Smart Road project will be implemented in a phased manner. Special parking facilities for the differently-abled will be provided along the roads.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Steps will be taken to ensure the quality of driving schools.
verbatim: Steps will be taken to ensure the quality of driving schools.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Pressure will be exerted on the Central Government to complete the electrification of Chengannur-Piravam, Haripad-Ernaku
verbatim: Pressure will be exerted on the Central Government to complete the electrification of Chengannur-Piravam, Haripad-Ernakulam, Thiruvananthapuram-Nagercoil roads on priority. Intervention will be made to complete the electrification of Shoranur-Mangalore road on priority.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Pressure will be exerted on the Central Government to complete and start operations of the Kanchikode Rail Coach Factory
verbatim: Pressure will be exerted on the Central Government to complete and start operations of the Kanchikode Rail Coach Factory.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A joint venture company will be formed with Indian Railways to convert the current Thiruvananthapuram-Mangalore route in
verbatim: A joint venture company will be formed with Indian Railways to convert the current Thiruvananthapuram-Mangalore route into a four-lane route. The doubling route will be prepared for high-speed trains. Pressure will be exerted on the central government to enable the cooperation and partnership of the railways for this.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Pressure will be exerted on the Central Government to commence the construction of the Guruvayur-Thirunavaya road, Sabar
verbatim: Pressure will be exerted on the Central Government to commence the construction of the Guruvayur-Thirunavaya road, Sabari road, Thalassery-Mysore road, the road connecting Erumeli and Punalur-Senkotta road, and the Nilambur-Nanjancode road on a priority basis.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The completion and efficient operation of the Kochi Metro and the Thiruvananthapuram and Kozhikode Light Metro projects
verbatim: The completion and efficient operation of the Kochi Metro and the Thiruvananthapuram and Kozhikode Light Metro projects will be ensured.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Multi-mode logistics park in Kochi, integrated freight transport facility to be implemented at major trade centres. Tran
verbatim: Multi-mode logistics park in Kochi, integrated freight transport facility to be implemented at major trade centres. Transit hubs to be launched in major cities.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A special development package will be implemented for the development of Kozhikode Airport, involving the cooperative se
verbatim: A special development package will be implemented for the development of Kozhikode Airport, involving the cooperative sector and expatriates.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Water Resources Department will be reorganized on a river basin basis and the activities of the Groundwater Division
verbatim: The Water Resources Department will be reorganized on a river basin basis and the activities of the Groundwater Division will be linked to it.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Under the leadership of local governments, water conservation and water security plans will be prepared in small watersh
verbatim: Under the leadership of local governments, water conservation and water security plans will be prepared in small watersheds with public participation and they will be appropriately integrated to form a river basin-based water security plan. A network of check dams and regulators will be constructed on the basis of scientific studies to convert the rivers themselves into water reservoirs. Plans will be formulated for groundwater recharge.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Punitive measures against pollution of water sources will be made stricter. A system will be created to safely manage fe
verbatim: Punitive measures against pollution of water sources will be made stricter. A system will be created to safely manage fecal waste.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Approved centers will be established in all local self-government institutions for water quality testing. A general syst
verbatim: Approved centers will be established in all local self-government institutions for water quality testing. A general system for this will also be prepared in school labs with the help of higher secondary school teachers and students.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Existing large-scale irrigation projects will be evaluated on the basis of strict inspection. The essential ones will be
verbatim: Existing large-scale irrigation projects will be evaluated on the basis of strict inspection. The essential ones will be completed in a timely manner. New projects will be taken up only after the existing ones are completed. Water distribution in irrigation projects will be made efficient according to the agricultural calendar. Irrigation facilities will be provided to more agricultural areas. An action plan will be formulated in collaboration with local self-government institutions for this.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The functioning of CADA will be comprehensively reorganized. A regional master plan will be prepared to utilize the empl
verbatim: The functioning of CADA will be comprehensively reorganized. A regional master plan will be prepared to utilize the employment guarantee scheme to a large extent to protect the rice fields by creating branch canals, distributors, field booths, head tanks, rainwater drainage channels, etc. Small-scale irrigation schemes and innovative irrigation schemes with high water utilization efficiency such as drip fertigation, micro irrigation and precision farming will be further promoted. Many schemes established for irrigation are in a state of ruin due to mechanical breakdowns and some other faults. Plans will be formulated to revive them and maintain them efficiently.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Special schemes will be formulated to address water scarcity in rain shadow areas. In the most water scarce areas, for e
verbatim: Special schemes will be formulated to address water scarcity in rain shadow areas. In the most water scarce areas, for example, in areas like Kozhinjampara and Vadakarapati in Chittoor taluk, the water use mentioned earlier will be increased. Schemes with high efficiency will be implemented with special priority.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A permanent task force will be formed to review inter-state river water agreements in a timely and appropriate manner. T
verbatim: A permanent task force will be formed to review inter-state river water agreements in a timely and appropriate manner. The inclusion of Pampa-Achankovil rivers in the river interlinking scheme will not be allowed. Efforts to build a new dam on the Mullaperiyar will continue.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A special action plan will be formulated to eliminate water pollution and protect rivers. The Pampa Action Plan will be
verbatim: A special action plan will be formulated to eliminate water pollution and protect rivers. The Pampa Action Plan will be implemented on a war footing. The Vempa Nadu Lake Restoration Project will be implemented. An action plan will be prepared on a local government basis to clean and maintain streams and tributaries.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Kuttanad package will be completed. To reduce pollution in Kuttanad, a new agricultural calendar will be prepared and the closing of Thanneermukkam shutters will be reduced to the minimum. Along with taking such a step, the Kuttanad drinking water project will be completed to ensure that there is no shortage of drinking water.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A system will be created to purify and reuse used water.
verbatim: A system will be created to purify and reuse used water.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Expert studies show that many crops are irrigated with 2-3 times more water than they need. Sprinkler irrigation is bein
verbatim: Expert studies show that many crops are irrigated with 2-3 times more water than they need. Sprinkler irrigation is being introduced for some crops to reduce water use.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Social auditing will be conducted for all water supply projects, regardless of size. The capacity, availability of the s
verbatim: Social auditing will be conducted for all water supply projects, regardless of size. The capacity, availability of the source, the actual number of existing beneficiaries, the current water supply efficiency, the actual condition of pipes, tanks, taps, etc., the water quality, the efficiency of the purification system, the problems faced, etc. will be assessed through this. Old projects will be rehabilitated if necessary.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Brihat projects are essential to address the drinking water shortage in urban areas. According to Kanesh Kumari, 30 percent of families have access to piped water. This will be increased to 50 percent. Old projects will be renovated. Purification systems will be made efficient.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Kerala Water Authority will be reorganized. Unsustainable debt will be eliminated. Crop losses will be significantly red
verbatim: Kerala Water Authority will be reorganized. Unsustainable debt will be eliminated. Crop losses will be significantly reduced. Losses will be paid as subsidy based on the MoU with the government.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The implementation and management of water fund projects will be reviewed. A special scheme will be formulated to revive
verbatim: The implementation and management of water fund projects will be reviewed. A special scheme will be formulated to revive these.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Special importance will be given to the protection of wells, which are the source of drinking water for more than 60 per
verbatim: Special importance will be given to the protection of wells, which are the source of drinking water for more than 60 percent of the people of Kerala. A system will be established in all local government institutions to protect wells and ponds, recharge them during the rainy season, and conduct weekly quality checks.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Sewage operations will be extended to villages.
verbatim: Sewage operations will be extended to villages.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In order to control the price of bottled water, the government will expand mechanisms to make it available at low cost.
verbatim: In order to control the price of bottled water, the government will expand mechanisms to make it available at low cost. Waste disposal

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Decentralized treatment technologies will be widely used to promote source-based waste treatment. The treatment of organ
verbatim: Decentralized treatment technologies will be widely used to promote source-based waste treatment. The treatment of organic waste at source will be encouraged. For this, technologies such as composting, biogas, and vermicomposting will be included. Safe food will be ensured by linking organic waste management in households with kitchen gardens.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Resource recovery enterprises that can operate profitably as family-run enterprises under the leadership of local govern
verbatim: Resource recovery enterprises that can operate profitably as family-run enterprises under the leadership of local government institutions will be established for the collection and safe disposal of inorganic waste. These enterprises will be enabled to handle the production and marketing of organic fertilizers and the safe disposal of hazardous waste and electronic waste generated at household institutional levels.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Trained management teams will be formed to ensure technical support for solid waste management activities. The activitie
verbatim: Trained management teams will be formed to ensure technical support for solid waste management activities. The activities of such teams will be under the control and supervision of local government institutions. Residents' associations will be given a leadership role.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Electronic bio-medical waste and hazardous waste will be collected and handed over to agencies approved by the Central Government.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Accessible and women-friendly public toilets will be ensured in the required public places. Highway comfort stations will be set up every 50 kilometers. This toilet network will be connected to the existing petrol pumps and highway eateries.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A campaign will be launched across the state on a mass planning model for safe waste management and environmental health
verbatim: A campaign will be launched across the state on a mass planning model for safe waste management and environmental health protection. Alternative products will be promoted to reduce the use of environmentally harmful products such as plastic.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Hygiene and health protection activities will be linked to national and international activities against global warming.
verbatim: Hygiene and health protection activities will be linked to national and international activities against global warming.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Legislation will be enacted to ensure strict action against those who pollute water and air.
verbatim: Legislation will be enacted to ensure strict action against those who pollute water and air.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: We will bring in large-scale projects to restore and protect our water resources, including rivers, lakes and wetlands.
verbatim: We will bring in large-scale projects to restore and protect our water resources, including rivers, lakes and wetlands. For this, Water Resources Conservation Committees will be formed in Kerala.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The processed waste will be used for agriculture.
verbatim: The processed waste will be used for agriculture.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The health policy will focus on the expansion and modernization of government hospitals. The state government's health e
verbatim: The health policy will focus on the expansion and modernization of government hospitals. The state government's health expenditure will be increased from 0.6 percent of the state's GDP to one percent annually, reaching five percent.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The health insurance scheme will be limited to medium-sized private hospitals, excluding large corporate hospitals as much as possible. The funds received through the insurance scheme will be utilized to further improve the infrastructure of government hospitals. This will ensure free treatment for cancer, kidney diseases, liver and brain tumors, etc.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The government will expand the facilities of health institutions. The staff pattern, including in PHCs, will be modified as needed by making appropriate changes. Primary health centers will be converted into family health centers.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The palliative care system will be made universal. Activities for this will be coordinated at the PHC level.
verbatim: The palliative care system will be made universal. Activities for this will be coordinated at the PHC level.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The surveillance system for infectious diseases will be strengthened. The complete universal immunization program will b
verbatim: The surveillance system for infectious diseases will be strengthened. The complete universal immunization program will be implemented with precision in all districts.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Health awareness programs for the prevention and early detection of lifestyle diseases will be implemented in collaborat
verbatim: Health awareness programs for the prevention and early detection of lifestyle diseases will be implemented in collaboration with the Local Government Department, Health Department, community health experts in medical colleges, and professional organizations. updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: Medicines for diabetes and blood pressure will be made available at low prices. Review check-ups will be made mandatory every three months. Steps will also be taken to ensure follow-up treatment for kidney and liver transplants at a moderate cost.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Public health subjects will be included in school and college curricula. The Clinical Establishments (Registration & Reg
verbatim: Public health subjects will be included in school and college curricula. The Clinical Establishments (Registration & Regulation) Rules approved by the Central Government will be implemented with appropriate amendments to ensure monitoring and social control of private hospitals and diagnostic centres.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.
