updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A general arrangement will be made to coordinate the distance learning systems running in the universities of Kerala. If
verbatim: A general arrangement will be made to coordinate the distance learning systems running in the universities of Kerala. If necessary, efforts will be made to establish an open university by coordinating opinions.
departments: Universities (Except Agricultural, Veterinary, Fisheries and Medical University)

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Necessary steps will be taken to protect the democratic rights and freedom of association of students, teachers and non-
verbatim: Necessary steps will be taken to protect the democratic rights and freedom of association of students, teachers and non-teaching staff, including in self-financing institutions. Universities will check and ensure that minimum basic facilities are available in self-financing colleges. It will be stipulated that only qualified persons recommended by central agencies and universities in the field of higher education will be appointed as teachers and staff. Legislation will be brought to ensure decent service and salary conditions for teaching and non-teaching staff in self-financing institutions.
departments: Universities (Except Agricultural, Veterinary, Fisheries and Medical University)

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Research institutions in Kerala will be formed in a way that emphasizes research activities that address the development
verbatim: Research institutions in Kerala will be formed in a way that emphasizes research activities that address the development problems of Kerala. The functioning of the Kerala Council for Scientific and Technological Research and research institutions will be subjected to a detailed examination and necessary amendments will be made.
departments: Universities (Except Agricultural, Veterinary, Fisheries and Medical University)

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Five engineering colleges in Kerala will be upgraded to Institutes of Technical Excellence. International standard infra
verbatim: Five engineering colleges in Kerala will be upgraded to Institutes of Technical Excellence. International standard infrastructure will be provided here.
departments: Universities (Except Agricultural, Veterinary, Fisheries and Medical University)

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Education loan arrears and the actions of banks have become a serious social problem. Repayment should not be forced unt
verbatim: Education loan arrears and the actions of banks have become a serious social problem. Repayment should not be forced until a job is found. Even if a job is found, repayment should not exceed a certain percentage of income. Efforts will be made to reach such a resolution. Subsidies will be provided for interest.
departments: Universities (Except Agricultural, Veterinary, Fisheries and Medical University)

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Financial assistance will be provided to those who come up with innovative ideas, both from and outside universities. Ef
verbatim: Financial assistance will be provided to those who come up with innovative ideas, both from and outside universities. Efforts will be made to implement innovative ideas emerging from universities and university research institutions in the public and government sectors.
departments: Universities (Except Agricultural, Veterinary, Fisheries and Medical University)

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: All workers in the unorganized sector will be brought under the welfare fund. The number of welfare fund members will be
verbatim: All workers in the unorganized sector will be brought under the welfare fund. The number of welfare fund members will be increased from five million to one crore. All wage earners such as employment-guaranteed workers, agricultural workers, workers in various traditional industries, and fishermen will be considered as BPL and brought under the social security net.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The minimum welfare pension will be fixed at Rs. 1000 in the first year and will be increased in subsequent years. In ad
verbatim: The minimum welfare pension will be fixed at Rs. 1000 in the first year and will be increased in subsequent years. In addition to this minimum pension, a system will be introduced to create a contributory pension for workers, especially those on fixed incomes, to become members by paying an additional amount every month. It will be ensured that welfare pensions are distributed correctly. A system will be created to deliver these directly to homes. A system will be created to further expand the social security pension scheme.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Comprehensive health insurance will be provided to the entire family members of the welfare fund members. As in the case
verbatim: Comprehensive health insurance will be provided to the entire family members of the welfare fund members. As in the case of pension, there will be a minimum health care available to everyone free of charge and additional health care available on payment of an additional premium. The comprehensive health insurance scheme will be expanded, ensuring that it is available to all those who are eligible and increasing the benefits. Efforts will be made to implement health insurance for PF pensioners who receive a pension of less than Rs. 1000. Strong pressure will be exerted on the Central Government to resolve the problems of PF pensioners.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Welfare funds will be allocated to cooking workers. Steps will be taken to bring them under the ESI ambit. Steps will al
verbatim: Welfare funds will be allocated to cooking workers. Steps will be taken to bring them under the ESI ambit. Steps will also be taken to start an insurance scheme. The ESI scheme will be made available to all eligible categories and the scope will be made statewide.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The welfare fund for domestic workers will be made operational and attractive.
verbatim: The welfare fund for domestic workers will be made operational and attractive.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A welfare fund will be established for low-income private temple employees. Time-bound grades will be allocated to templ
verbatim: A welfare fund will be established for low-income private temple employees. Time-bound grades will be allocated to temple employees.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A package will be implemented to provide employment to toddy tapper workers, charaya workers, and bar waiters who have l
verbatim: A package will be implemented to provide employment to toddy tapper workers, charaya workers, and bar waiters who have lost their jobs.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Awareness and legal mechanisms will be ensured to eliminate attacks, torture and sexual abuse against children. A vigila
verbatim: Awareness and legal mechanisms will be ensured to eliminate attacks, torture and sexual abuse against children. A vigilance committee will be formed comprising representatives of children, local self-governments and parents' committees.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The schemes implemented in the state for the health care of children such as Arogya Kiranam, Thalolam, Karunya, Ammayum
verbatim: The schemes implemented in the state for the health care of children such as Arogya Kiranam, Thalolam, Karunya, Ammayum Kunjum, etc. will be reinstated. The number of hospitals for mothers and children and the services they provide will be increased and improved.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The EMS Housing Scheme and the MN Lakshaveedu Scheme will be revived. This will be implemented in conjunction with the C
verbatim: The EMS Housing Scheme and the MN Lakshaveedu Scheme will be revived. This will be implemented in conjunction with the Central IAY Housing Scheme. For this, a complete list of unfinished houses will be prepared as an initial step and a special scheme will be formulated to complete their construction. Those who do not own land will be allowed to buy land in a location of their choice and a certain percentage of the fair value determined by the government will be provided as additional assistance. The government itself will also consider acquiring land and providing it for the construction of houses for the landless. One lakh houses will be built annually and housing will be ensured for everyone within five years.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: No permit will be required for construction of houses up to 1000 square feet on land less than 5 cents. Permits will als
verbatim: No permit will be required for construction of houses up to 1000 square feet on land less than 5 cents. Permits will also be waived for construction of houses up to 1500 square feet with solar panels installed. Building tax will be waived for houses up to 1000 square feet.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: CRZ will provide relief on the basis of building line for houses up to 1500 sq ft on the seashore and other coasts and t
verbatim: CRZ will provide relief on the basis of building line for houses up to 1500 sq ft on the seashore and other coasts and those built before 2010. Pressure will be exerted on the Centre for this in the area covered by the Central Act.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Planning cess will be imposed on large building complexes. This amount will be used to build houses for the homeless.
verbatim: Planning cess will be imposed on large building complexes. This amount will be used to build houses for the homeless.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The BPL limit in Kerala has led to a situation where a significant section of the poor are excluded from the public dist
verbatim: The BPL limit in Kerala has led to a situation where a significant section of the poor are excluded from the public distribution system. AAY-BPL families will be provided with free rice. Various unorganized labour groups and employment-guaranteed workers will be considered as BPL and a system will be made to provide free ration to them.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The ration cards to be renewed in 2013 have not yet been distributed. The distribution of ration cards will be completed
verbatim: The ration cards to be renewed in 2013 have not yet been distributed. The distribution of ration cards will be completed within a year. Complaints arising in this regard will be resolved.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Civil Supplies Corporation will be empowered to intervene in the market to maintain the price level in the public ma
verbatim: The Civil Supplies Corporation will be empowered to intervene in the market to maintain the price level in the public market. A thorough investigation will be conducted into the activities of ConsumerFed, those involved in corruption and evasion will be punished, and the liabilities of ConsumerFed will be settled in one go. Steps will be taken to utilize the vast network of cooperative societies for market intervention during the festive season.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The operation of Maveli stores will be strengthened. The prices of products in Maveli stores will not be increased for t
verbatim: The operation of Maveli stores will be strengthened. The prices of products in Maveli stores will not be increased for the next five years.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A grievance redressal commission will be formed as recommended in the Justice Wadhwa Committee report to prevent fraud,
verbatim: A grievance redressal commission will be formed as recommended in the Justice Wadhwa Committee report to prevent fraud, black marketing, hoarding, holiday trading, artificial price hikes, etc. in the foodgrain market.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The ration shop network in Kerala cannot be sustained on the basis of the present limited ration turnover. Therefore, th
verbatim: The ration shop network in Kerala cannot be sustained on the basis of the present limited ration turnover. Therefore, these will be diversified and modernized to develop into a regulated price marketing network. The State Government will intervene to address the irregularities and irregularities in the LPG distribution sector.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Kerala will be made a hunger-free state. A scheme will be formulated to provide free one-time meals to all those in need
verbatim: Kerala will be made a hunger-free state. A scheme will be formulated to provide free one-time meals to all those in need. It will be implemented in selected areas on a pilot basis first. Steps will be taken to involve the private sector.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A chain of accredited hotels will be started under the auspices of Kudumbashree to provide quality food at affordable pr
verbatim: A chain of accredited hotels will be started under the auspices of Kudumbashree to provide quality food at affordable prices.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Kerala government will radically reform the welfare scheme for migrant workers in 2010 and make it more attractive.
verbatim: The Kerala government will radically reform the welfare scheme for migrant workers in 2010 and make it more attractive. A comprehensive legislation will be brought regarding migrant workers based on the framework of central and state laws.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A social security scheme will be prepared to provide clean and hygienic housing to migrant workers at reasonable rates.
verbatim: A social security scheme will be prepared to provide clean and hygienic housing to migrant workers at reasonable rates. Since RSBY is a health insurance scheme that can be used nationwide, they will be brought under the health insurance scheme.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Special health systems for the elderly will be created at all levels, from social health hospitals upwards.
verbatim: Special health systems for the elderly will be created at all levels, from social health hospitals upwards.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The palliative care network will be made universal.
verbatim: The palliative care network will be made universal.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The number of day homes for the elderly will be increased and facilities for recreation, group activities and light meal
verbatim: The number of day homes for the elderly will be increased and facilities for recreation, group activities and light meals will be ensured in such centers. A comprehensive study will be conducted on the problems of the elderly and interventions will be made to solve the problems.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A transgender policy will be implemented that provides special consideration for transgender people in the fields of hea
verbatim: A transgender policy will be implemented that provides special consideration for transgender people in the fields of health, education, and employment.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The state government's financial assistance to Buds schools will be significantly increased. The salaries of teachers wi
verbatim: The state government's financial assistance to Buds schools will be significantly increased. The salaries of teachers will be increased. Social care will be ensured for all children with autism. All eligible special schools will be converted into aided schools. The government will also provide special financial assistance to other institutions.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Corporation for the Disabled will be reorganized. Offices will be allocated in district centers. Similarly, the Soci
verbatim: The Corporation for the Disabled will be reorganized. Offices will be allocated in district centers. Similarly, the Social Security Mission will also undergo a radical reorganization. Financial assistance to orphanages will be increased.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Disabled persons will be allowed to work in bunks in institutions such as KSRTC, District Hospital, Collectorate, Taluk
verbatim: Disabled persons will be allowed to work in bunks in institutions such as KSRTC, District Hospital, Collectorate, Taluk Office, Civil Station.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Reservation for the disabled will be fully implemented in government/semi-government institutions.
verbatim: Reservation for the disabled will be fully implemented in government/semi-government institutions.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: All possible steps should be taken to improve the land ownership of Dalits. For this, the available outlying land and su
verbatim: All possible steps should be taken to improve the land ownership of Dalits. For this, the available outlying land and surplus land in each area will be immediately distributed to about 22,000 landless families. At least a place to sleep will be ensured for everyone.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In the schemes where local self-government bodies and the Scheduled Caste Development Department provide financial assis
verbatim: In the schemes where local self-government bodies and the Scheduled Caste Development Department provide financial assistance for land acquisition, Dalit families will be given the freedom to locate land in the area of ​​their choice. The market value of the land located within the limits of the respective local government body will be provided to them as financial assistance.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: If there are children studying in existing homes, financial assistance will be provided to build a new study room of the
verbatim: If there are children studying in existing homes, financial assistance will be provided to build a new study room of their own as part of the house.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Minimum basic facilities will be determined for each habitat. In addition, additional facilities such as waterlogging pr
verbatim: Minimum basic facilities will be determined for each habitat. In addition, additional facilities such as waterlogging prevention will be determined, taking into account the specificities of each area. A special program will be prepared to provide these as a package to all the sanctuaries within five years.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Considering the fact that the failure and dropout rate among Dalit students is high during studies, in order to address
verbatim: Considering the fact that the failure and dropout rate among Dalit students is high during studies, in order to address this, facilities will be made to provide continuous special training to the children who are lagging behind in studies in schools. Along with this, a study house project will be developed for Dalit students to study away from the home environment, focusing on shelters where more than 25 Dalit families live, as needed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Pre-matric and post-matric hostels for Dalit children will be modernized. Not only will the accommodation and food facil
verbatim: Pre-matric and post-matric hostels for Dalit children will be modernized. Not only will the accommodation and food facilities be improved, but computer labs and internet facilities in the rooms will be ensured in the hostels. In the case of post-matric hostels, tutors will be appointed at a rate of at least one for every 20 children to help the children in their studies. The district panchayats will be responsible for their management. The district panchayat will appoint a social audit committee to evaluate the activities once in three months and make necessary corrections.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Model residential schools for Dalit students will be provided with multi-media classrooms, playgrounds and nutritious fo
verbatim: Model residential schools for Dalit students will be provided with multi-media classrooms, playgrounds and nutritious food. Children will also be provided with their own computers from the high school level onwards. School Management Committees will be formed to manage the model residential schools.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The financial assistance provided to Dalit students will be increased to Rs. 750 per month at primary and upper primary
verbatim: The financial assistance provided to Dalit students will be increased to Rs. 750 per month at primary and upper primary levels and Rs. 1000 at high school and higher secondary levels. The amount will be revised every 3 years according to the cost of living. Students at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels will be given a minimum stipend of Rs. 3000 for accommodation in college hostels. College students will be provided with their own computers.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Special finishing schools will be started for professional students who drop out of school due to failure, a large porti
verbatim: Special finishing schools will be started for professional students who drop out of school due to failure, a large portion of whom are Dalit students.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Free laptops will be provided to Dalit and tribal children studying in professional colleges. Other bright university st
verbatim: Free laptops will be provided to Dalit and tribal children studying in professional colleges. Other bright university students will also get the same benefit.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: All Dalit families, except those employed in the organized sector, will be considered BPL and provided with ration and o
verbatim: All Dalit families, except those employed in the organized sector, will be considered BPL and provided with ration and other benefits.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The guidelines will be revised from time to time, subjecting the local governments' special schemes for Dalits to a comp
verbatim: The guidelines will be revised from time to time, subjecting the local governments' special schemes for Dalits to a comprehensive evaluation based on the experiences of the last decade and a half.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Local governments will take steps to introduce a family-based approach in the planning and implementation of Dalit devel
verbatim: Local governments will take steps to introduce a family-based approach in the planning and implementation of Dalit development projects, giving special consideration to each Dalit family in their area. Special Gram Sabhas of Dalits will be convened at the Panchayat/Municipal level once a year to plan Dalit development projects.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Special courts will be established in all districts to deal with cases under the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Atr
verbatim: Special courts will be established in all districts to deal with cases under the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Atrocities Prevention Act.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A special financial package will be implemented in all districts for Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe entrepreneurs t
verbatim: A special financial package will be implemented in all districts for Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe entrepreneurs to start new industrial ventures. Plans will be prepared for the start-up of Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe start-ups in all districts.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: For the development of infrastructure in tribal villages, projects will be formulated at the cluster level of 3-4 villag
verbatim: For the development of infrastructure in tribal villages, projects will be formulated at the cluster level of 3-4 villages. Roads to the villages, drinking water, solar systems where electricity is not available, Anganwadis, housing, study houses, soil conservation activities, etc. will be ensured.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Instead of prefabricated houses, the housing project will be designed by understanding the needs and interests of the fa
verbatim: Instead of prefabricated houses, the housing project will be designed by understanding the needs and interests of the family. The model successfully implemented in Attappadi will be adopted for this.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Steps will be taken to protect the rights of the tribals to their land and ensure their security. Resolving the land iss
verbatim: Steps will be taken to protect the rights of the tribals to their land and ensure their security. Resolving the land issue is essential for the comprehensive development of the tribals. Steps will be taken to provide at least one acre of land to all landless tribal families. The Gram Panchayats of the respective areas will provide an opportunity to the tribals to acquire and cultivate fallow land. In districts with plantation areas, plantations whose lease period has expired will be used for this purpose. Along with this, the Forest Rights Act of 2005 will be implemented scientifically in Kerala.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Food security and nutritional availability will be ensured in the long term by implementing policies that will enable th
verbatim: Food security and nutritional availability will be ensured in the long term by implementing policies that will enable those who own land in tribal villages to cultivate there and produce food on their own.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Tribal youth labor forces will be formed and they will be trained in small-scale agricultural mechanization. It will be
verbatim: Tribal youth labor forces will be formed and they will be trained in small-scale agricultural mechanization. It will be ensured that tribal groups receive all welfare pensions. Ration cards will be ensured for everyone.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Social support centers will be set up in each district to provide special training and accommodation to tribal children
verbatim: Social support centers will be set up in each district to provide special training and accommodation to tribal children who drop out of school for various reasons to complete their studies. 2-3 month finishing school programs will be conducted centered around these social support centers.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: As a traditional employment sector, processing and marketing centers for the scientific collection and marketing of fore
verbatim: As a traditional employment sector, processing and marketing centers for the scientific collection and marketing of forest resources collected from the forest area will be planned, focusing on forest areas with high tribal population density.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: It will be ensured that the accommodation, food, recreational facilities and learning facilities of residential schools
verbatim: It will be ensured that the accommodation, food, recreational facilities and learning facilities of residential schools are of high standard. Internet facilities, computer labs, science laboratories and facilities for extra-curricular activities will be ensured. The number of teachers and tutors in residential schools will be increased and the student-teacher-tutor ratio will be increased. Teachers from tribal communities will be given priority in appointment in schools in their areas.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In the case of children staying and studying in model residential schools and hostels, their learning abilities will be
verbatim: In the case of children staying and studying in model residential schools and hostels, their learning abilities will be assessed in each class and necessary remedial teaching activities will be implemented at the institution level. Special teachers will be assigned for this purpose. Teachers will be provided in proportion to the number of children.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Study houses will be established under the leadership of the Gram Panchayats in villages where there are many children w
verbatim: Study houses will be established under the leadership of the Gram Panchayats in villages where there are many children who come and go to school from their homes. A trained facilitator in education will be appointed for each village at a decent salary. The children will be provided with food in the morning and evening and learning facilities will be provided.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Pre-matric and post-matric hostels for tribal children will be provided with modern building facilities, learning facili
verbatim: Pre-matric and post-matric hostels for tribal children will be provided with modern building facilities, learning facilities, nutritious food and internet facilities.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Monthly visits of medical teams and health monitoring will be ensured in tribal villages. Special care will be provided
verbatim: Monthly visits of medical teams and health monitoring will be ensured in tribal villages. Special care will be provided to those in need through Anganwadis. Regular distribution of iron tablets will be ensured through Anganwadis.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Basic facilities will be ensured in tribal villages. Facilities in health centers in tribal areas will be expanded and m
verbatim: Basic facilities will be ensured in tribal villages. Facilities in health centers in tribal areas will be expanded and more doctors and staff will be appointed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In the existing public distribution system, kits containing food items like rice, edible oil, pulses, ragi, sorghum etc.
verbatim: In the existing public distribution system, kits containing food items like rice, edible oil, pulses, ragi, sorghum etc. will be provided through ration shops. A card system with a biometric reader will be introduced to record rationing. Along with this, nutritious food will be delivered to the homes of girls below 18 years of age, pregnant women, lactating mothers, elderly people above 60 years of age and children below 6 years of age in each village.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Tribal village groups will be given more power. The three-tier Panchayats will be required to accept their decisions on
verbatim: Tribal village groups will be given more power. The three-tier Panchayats will be required to accept their decisions on matters related to the village. The village groups will be given the power to conduct all development activities and social surveys in the respective village. An executive committee will be formed for the village groups, which will be elected by the people. Thus, the Panchayat-level Gram Sabha will consist of the members of the executive committees of all the villages in the Gram Panchayat.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The State Government shall prepare a statistical report on the condition of tribals in the State every year. The project
verbatim: The State Government shall prepare a statistical report on the condition of tribals in the State every year. The project expenditure, physical achievements and weaknesses shall be analysed in these reports. Block wise figures shall also be provided in these reports. This report shall be subjected to social audit by a public meeting convened by tribal organizations, civil society organizations, political movements and representatives of tribal villages.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: An important development institution for Dalit Christians to get assistance from the government is the Christian Develop
verbatim: An important development institution for Dalit Christians to get assistance from the government is the Christian Development Corporation. Its functioning is currently deplorable. Steps will be taken to make it effective.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The non-plan fund earmarked for providing educational benefits to Dalit Christian students is not sufficient. Therefore,
verbatim: The non-plan fund earmarked for providing educational benefits to Dalit Christian students is not sufficient. Therefore, steps will be taken to double this allocation. All educational benefits for Scheduled Castes will be provided to Dalit Christians in equal measure.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Steps will be taken to write off the outstanding debts of Dalit Christians, just like those of Scheduled Castes.
verbatim: Steps will be taken to write off the outstanding debts of Dalit Christians, just like those of Scheduled Castes.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: More funds will be made available to the Backward Classes Development Corporation. Educational assistance based on the K
verbatim: More funds will be made available to the Backward Classes Development Corporation. Educational assistance based on the Kumara Pillai Commission will be increased. Steps will be taken to address the shortcomings of Kasaragod Tulu Christians. A Backward Classes Welfare Department will be formed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The recommendations of the Paloli Committee, which are part of the Sachar Committee recommendations, will be implemented
verbatim: The recommendations of the Paloli Committee, which are part of the Sachar Committee recommendations, will be implemented. A permanent grant will be allocated to the Hajj Committee. Financial assistance to the Waqf Board will be increased.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A plan will be implemented to renovate temples not under the jurisdiction of Devaswom Boards and to provide decent wages
verbatim: A plan will be implemented to renovate temples not under the jurisdiction of Devaswom Boards and to provide decent wages to the temple attendants and other employees there. Activities will be planned to protect the economically backward sections of the upper caste. The amount for this will be assessed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A separate department for women will be set up. In addition to the schemes directly under the department, this ministry
verbatim: A separate department for women will be set up. In addition to the schemes directly under the department, this ministry will be responsible for gender audit and coordination of schemes of other departments related to women.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Steps will be taken to increase the female labor force participation rate in Kerala from the current 15 percent to 18 pe
verbatim: Steps will be taken to increase the female labor force participation rate in Kerala from the current 15 percent to 18 percent by 2021. Necessary training, job incentives and continuous monitoring will be ensured for this. Projects will be ensured as part of the Women's Component Plan to enable women to enter new non-traditional employment sectors.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Government housing schemes and land distribution will be in the name of the woman or in a joint name.
verbatim: Government housing schemes and land distribution will be in the name of the woman or in a joint name.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The welfare fund for domestic workers, who make up the largest number of women workers in cities, will be expanded. Toda
verbatim: The welfare fund for domestic workers, who make up the largest number of women workers in cities, will be expanded. Today, the home nurses' market is more organized. A similar system will be created for domestic workers as well.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Systems will be created to create special registration and constant contact for women going abroad to work.
verbatim: Systems will be created to create special registration and constant contact for women going abroad to work.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Employers will be encouraged to ensure toilets, rest areas, childcare facilities, travel arrangements, time management,
verbatim: Employers will be encouraged to ensure toilets, rest areas, childcare facilities, travel arrangements, time management, security arrangements, and anti-sexual harassment committees. A special gender audit will be conducted to make all government offices women-friendly and the recommendations will be implemented in a timely manner.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Hospitals will become women-friendly and maternity hospitals will be modernized. Privacy and safety will be ensured in m
verbatim: Hospitals will become women-friendly and maternity hospitals will be modernized. Privacy and safety will be ensured in maternity wards.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Gender audit and gender budgeting will be restored in the state budget. Ten percent of the budget will be allocated for
verbatim: Gender audit and gender budgeting will be restored in the state budget. Ten percent of the budget will be allocated for special projects for women.A special statement regarding this will be presented in the Legislative Assembly as part of the annual budget.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Child Abuse Prevention Act (2012), the Domestic Violence Prevention Act (2005), and the Sexual Harassment at Workpla
verbatim: The Child Abuse Prevention Act (2012), the Domestic Violence Prevention Act (2005), and the Sexual Harassment at Workplace Act (2013) will be strictly implemented in their entirety. The Women Friendly Village/Urban Scheme to reduce violence against women will be implemented through the Local Self Government Institutions.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Women-friendly rehabilitation centers will be started with modern facilities. Short-stay homes will be established in co
verbatim: Women-friendly rehabilitation centers will be started with modern facilities. Short-stay homes will be established in collaboration with voluntary organizations and others.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The activities of the Women's Commission so far will be examined on the basis of the collaboration of the previous chair
verbatim: The activities of the Women's Commission so far will be examined on the basis of the collaboration of the previous chairpersons and steps will be taken to make it more effective. The Women's Commission's relationship with the Vigilance Committees will be further strengthened.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Gender Park, which was launched with the aim of all-round development of women, will change the situation by diverti
verbatim: The Gender Park, which was launched with the aim of all-round development of women, will change the situation by diverting from that aim. The Gender Park will also be made adequate to coordinate various programs for skill development, job training and livelihood of women.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A permanent legal gender awareness training center will be established. Training will be provided to judges, counsellors
verbatim: A permanent legal gender awareness training center will be established. Training will be provided to judges, counsellors, protection officers, lawyers registered with the Legal Services Authority, and paralegal volunteers. Legislation will be enacted against violence in public places. The number of women police will be increased. The Matrimonial Property Rights Act will be passed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A center of excellence will be established for women's studies and awareness raising.
verbatim: A center of excellence will be established for women's studies and awareness raising.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A special scheme will be formed to protect destitute widows.
verbatim: A special scheme will be formed to protect destitute widows.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Kudumbashree will be a women's neighborhood group system supported and funded by the state government. Currently, about
verbatim: Kudumbashree will be a women's neighborhood group system supported and funded by the state government. Currently, about 50 percent of families are members of Kudumbashree. This will be increased to 75 percent. Kudumbashree will function as a common platform for women empowerment and poverty alleviation programs of the central, state and local governments. Kudumbashree has received Rs. 50 crore each in the last two years. This will be increased to Rs. 150 crore.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Kudumbashree will be secured loans from banks at 4 percent interest. The government will provide interest subsidy direct
verbatim: Kudumbashree will be secured loans from banks at 4 percent interest. The government will provide interest subsidy directly to the banks.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The outstanding revolving fund, group farming subsidy, Ashraya financial assistance, and assistance for micro-enterprise
verbatim: The outstanding revolving fund, group farming subsidy, Ashraya financial assistance, and assistance for micro-enterprises to Kudumbashree will be paid immediately.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A thorough investigation will be conducted into corruption in Kudumbashree and the culprits will be punished. All missio
verbatim: A thorough investigation will be conducted into corruption in Kudumbashree and the culprits will be punished. All mission officials who have been proven to be unfriendly to women will be removed. The mission will be reorganized based on transparent criteria and taking into account work experience in Kudumbashree.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A scheme will be formulated to assist self-employed entrepreneurs who have started self-employment ventures and are in d
verbatim: A scheme will be formulated to assist self-employed entrepreneurs who have started self-employment ventures and are in debt. Necessary changes will be made in the administration of self-employment schemes to ensure that such shortcomings do not recur.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A government-level market will be ensured for Kudumbashree products. For this, branded shops will be opened in all panch
verbatim: A government-level market will be ensured for Kudumbashree products. For this, branded shops will be opened in all panchayats and cities. Kudumbashree products will be given priority in civil supply stores.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Ashraya scheme will be expanded. Complete security will be ensured to all destitute families through the Ashraya sch
verbatim: The Ashraya scheme will be expanded. Complete security will be ensured to all destitute families through the Ashraya scheme.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A State Cooperative Bank will be formed on a state basis by merging the District Banks and the State Cooperative Bank.
verbatim: A State Cooperative Bank will be formed on a state basis by merging the District Banks and the State Cooperative Bank.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Comprehensive programs for agricultural development will be formulated in collaboration with local self-government insti
verbatim: Comprehensive programs for agricultural development will be formulated in collaboration with local self-government institutions and agricultural loans will be increased to at least 70 percent. Loans will be provided to farmer producer companies and farmer entrepreneurs on generous terms. Bylaws will be amended to provide loans in agriculture-related sectors.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Additional funds from the cooperative sector will be used for social development activities by the local self-government
verbatim: Additional funds from the cooperative sector will be used for social development activities by the local self-governments or the state government at the district or state level, and schemes will be formulated to utilize them. Steps will be taken to utilize them for infrastructure development, as was done in EMS Housing.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A mechanism will be formed at the Panchayat level to address the shortcomings related to the distribution of short-term
verbatim: A mechanism will be formed at the Panchayat level to address the shortcomings related to the distribution of short-term agricultural credit for paddy cultivation, vegetable cultivation, etc., and to increase agricultural production and marketing of products. This committee will consist of the President, Secretary, Agriculture Department Officer, Panchayat Secretary, President, etc. of the Primary Agricultural Credit Group.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The state government's share capital participation in state cooperative banks with accumulated losses exceeding their ow
verbatim: The state government's share capital participation in state cooperative banks with accumulated losses exceeding their own funds will be increased, and loans given to apex groups that have become non-performing loans will be converted into standard loans.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A core banking network will be established by connecting the cooperative banks in Kerala. This network will have a syste
verbatim: A core banking network will be established by connecting the cooperative banks in Kerala. This network will have a system to verify the cheque books and signatures of all banks online and transfer money immediately.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: With the aim of strengthening the cooperative movement to eradicate the Blades, a distribution collection network will b
verbatim: With the aim of strengthening the cooperative movement to eradicate the Blades, a distribution collection network will be formed in collaboration with Kudumbashree.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The systems of Youth Coordination Councils, Youth Coordinators and Youth Centers established in Local Self-Government In
verbatim: The systems of Youth Coordination Councils, Youth Coordinators and Youth Centers established in Local Self-Government Institutions will be further strengthened. Coordination Councils will be formed at the district level to ensure youth participation in development. The functioning of the Youth Welfare Board will be made more efficient.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Sports Council-Youth Welfare Board will coordinate its activities. A mechanism will be introduced to coordinate yout
verbatim: The Sports Council-Youth Welfare Board will coordinate its activities. A mechanism will be introduced to coordinate youth welfare activities with the Department of Labor, Department of Education, Department of Culture, and Department of Social Welfare. The Kerala Youth Forum will be expanded into the largest gathering of Kerala youth.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Employment Exchanges in Kerala will be radically reorganized. Employment Exchanges will be transformed into a robust sys
verbatim: Employment Exchanges in Kerala will be radically reorganized. Employment Exchanges will be transformed into a robust system that coordinates all types of employment opportunities (including private sector) and educational opportunities.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The ban on undeclared appointments will be lifted. The practice of cutting posts will be stopped. It will be ensured tha
verbatim: The ban on undeclared appointments will be lifted. The practice of cutting posts will be stopped. It will be ensured that appointment orders will be received within 90 days of receiving the advice memo. It will be ensured that vacancies arising in each department will be informed to the PSC within 10 days.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The lost popular participation and transparency of democratic decentralization will be recreated. Steps will be taken to
verbatim: The lost popular participation and transparency of democratic decentralization will be recreated. Steps will be taken to amend the Kerala Panchayat Raj/Municipal Act to provide legal protection to popular participatory organizational systems. For this, Gram Sabhas will be made effective. Kudumbashree Neighborhood Groups, Residence Associations and Men's Self-Help Groups will be recognized as sub-units of Gram Sabha. Steps will be taken to provide the agenda to these groups before the Gram Sabha.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: To make decentralization effective and to coordinate the functioning of local self-government institutions, local self-g
verbatim: To make decentralization effective and to coordinate the functioning of local self-government institutions, local self-government institutions at all levels will be brought under a single department. The three departments of Panchayats, Urban Development and Rural Development will be merged into a department with one minister, one secretary and one general cadre.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Development authorities, which are power centers operating parallel to municipalities, are against the essence of decent
verbatim: Development authorities, which are power centers operating parallel to municipalities, are against the essence of decentralization of power and the local government system. Such parallel power institutions will be reduced to a minimum.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Right to Know, Right to Service Act and the Bill of Rights will be implemented in its full sense. Steps will be take
verbatim: The Right to Know, Right to Service Act and the Bill of Rights will be implemented in its full sense. Steps will be taken to strengthen the people-centered governance system at the local government level.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Decentralized training systems will be set up on a regional and district basis and training will be planned and implemen
verbatim: Decentralized training systems will be set up on a regional and district basis and training will be planned and implemented in a timely and efficient manner. Coordination will be ensured between the training curriculum of the training institutions operating under various development departments and the training curriculum of the Local Self-Government Department.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: All local government offices will take steps to ensure ISO certification in a timely manner.
verbatim: All local government offices will take steps to ensure ISO certification in a timely manner.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The existing law for preparing district plans will be repealed. The move to prepare district plans under the Town and Co
verbatim: The existing law for preparing district plans will be repealed. The move to prepare district plans under the Town and Country Planning Department is against the ideals of decentralization and the Constitution. This action will be corrected.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The District Planning Committee will be strengthened. The Collector will be removed from the position of the appellate a
verbatim: The District Planning Committee will be strengthened. The Collector will be removed from the position of the appellate authority for disputes related to the project. The responsibility of preparing the district plan will be entrusted to the DPC. The DPC will be reorganized in such a way that the full responsibility of the project document, inspection and approval will be given to the DPC.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A maximum limit will be set for investment in road infrastructure and a minimum limit for spending in the productive sec
verbatim: A maximum limit will be set for investment in road infrastructure and a minimum limit for spending in the productive sector.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In addition to the State Budget allocation, Local Self-Government Institutions will be given the necessary freedom to ge
verbatim: In addition to the State Budget allocation, Local Self-Government Institutions will be given the necessary freedom to generate their own income and utilize additional resource mobilization opportunities. In necessary circumstances, permission will be given to borrow money with government guarantee.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The system of providing grants to local self-government institutions in advance in 12 monthly installments will be resto
verbatim: The system of providing grants to local self-government institutions in advance in 12 monthly installments will be restored.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Integrated and comprehensive spatial and water planning integrating soil, water, and biological resources will be undert
verbatim: Integrated and comprehensive spatial and water planning integrating soil, water, and biological resources will be undertaken at the local level.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In each local government, labor forces will be formed comprising young men and women who are willing to do small-scale m
verbatim: In each local government, labor forces will be formed comprising young men and women who are willing to do small-scale mechanized agricultural work. A steady income and social security will be ensured to the members of such labor force. They will be made service centers by providing all technical skills related to agriculture.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A broad popular campaign related to the implementation of the project will be launched. Projects in all sectors will be
verbatim: A broad popular campaign related to the implementation of the project will be launched. Projects in all sectors will be linked to this. However, this new popular movement will be mainly based on waste management, organic farming and employment guarantee. The new atmosphere and willpower created by this popular movement will be utilized to elevate the decentralization of power in Kerala to a new level.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The government will provide assistance to those trying to go abroad for work. A strong effort will be made to get the ce
verbatim: The government will provide assistance to those trying to go abroad for work. A strong effort will be made to get the central government to intervene to end discrimination against expatriates in matters including high airfares. Kerala's own airline will be started. Efforts will be made for a comprehensive immigration law that ensures the welfare and encouragement of immigrants.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The state government will undertake to provide information about new job opportunities to job seekers, run finishing sch
verbatim: The state government will undertake to provide information about new job opportunities to job seekers, run finishing schools, and provide generous loans for immigration.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A comprehensive database on expatriates will be prepared. Systems will be created to introduce new generations of Malaya
verbatim: A comprehensive database on expatriates will be prepared. Systems will be created to introduce new generations of Malayalis living abroad, especially in Western countries, to Malayalam and Malayalam culture on a regular basis. Moreover, the work of the Malayalam Mission to promote language learning will be expanded.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Regional and global conferences and interactions of expatriate organizations will be organized at least once a year.
verbatim: Regional and global conferences and interactions of expatriate organizations will be organized at least once a year.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: By coordinating the Kerala expatriate organizations, a scheme will be made to provide protection to those who are sick,
verbatim: By coordinating the Kerala expatriate organizations, a scheme will be made to provide protection to those who are sick, have accidents, and lose their jobs. In countries with a large Malayali population, an officer from Kerala will be appointed for this purpose. Delays in bringing the body back home will be avoided. A panel of lawyers will be formed in each region to provide legal aid to those in jail, involved in cases, and those who have been denied legal rights.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Facilities will be created for those returning from abroad to register their names in advance and discuss their needs an
verbatim: Facilities will be created for those returning from abroad to register their names in advance and discuss their needs and problems with NORKA. A special system will be created to resettle those who lose their jobs before the expiration of their immigration period.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Specific schemes will be formulated to attract the talents and savings of expatriates to development sectors.
verbatim: Specific schemes will be formulated to attract the talents and savings of expatriates to development sectors.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A Kerala Development Fund will be established. Non-residents who are willing to invest a certain amount of deposit as sh
verbatim: A Kerala Development Fund will be established. Non-residents who are willing to invest a certain amount of deposit as shares in declared non-resident enterprises will have the right to get a job in any institution according to their qualifications when they return after completing their stay. Such an enterprise will be very attractive as an investment to ensure a job in the country when they return from the Gulf.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In addition to the fund, industrial enterprises will be started on the Inkel model, a joint venture of expatriate Malaya
verbatim: In addition to the fund, industrial enterprises will be started on the Inkel model, a joint venture of expatriate Malayalis in partnership with the government.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Special loan facilities will be increased for expatriates to start businesses. An agency will be established to communic
verbatim: Special loan facilities will be increased for expatriates to start businesses. An agency will be established to communicate with potential expatriates, especially professionals, before they return home. Investors will also be provided with the necessary permits through a single-window system.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Cooperatives of expatriates will be encouraged.
verbatim: Cooperatives of expatriates will be encouraged.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Contributions from expatriates can play a major role in the development of educational institutions, health institutions
verbatim: Contributions from expatriates can play a major role in the development of educational institutions, health institutions, etc. In order to encourage such contributions, a scheme will be formulated under which the government will provide an amount equal to or proportional to every rupee contributed by expatriates.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Kerala Expatriate Chambers of Commerce will be formed to maintain active relations with expatriate industrial and commer
verbatim: Kerala Expatriate Chambers of Commerce will be formed to maintain active relations with expatriate industrial and commercial entrepreneurs abroad. There will be separate chambers for each foreign region. Friendly relations will be developed between these and the chambers in Kerala.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Expatriate professional organizations will be formed in all countries. These organizations will be linked with research
verbatim: Expatriate professional organizations will be formed in all countries. These organizations will be linked with research institutions and industrial enterprises in Kerala.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Special sections will be created in NORKA for all Malayalis working abroad, returning and working in other states. There
verbatim: Special sections will be created in NORKA for all Malayalis working abroad, returning and working in other states. There will also be special regional sub-departments for expatriates working abroad. The responsibility of running this will be entrusted to professionals.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The activities of the Welfare Fund will be expanded. The dividend and retirement pension will be increased.
verbatim: The activities of the Welfare Fund will be expanded. The dividend and retirement pension will be increased.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The budget allocation for the Expatriate Department will be increased significantly. A small percentage of the expatriat
verbatim: The budget allocation for the Expatriate Department will be increased significantly. A small percentage of the expatriate remittances from abroad will be allocated for expatriate welfare every year.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The interest-free financial institution started by the Left Democratic Front government is now defunct. This institution
verbatim: The interest-free financial institution started by the Left Democratic Front government is now defunct. This institution will be revived and expanded.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: When expatriates have to return due to law and order problems in foreign countries, a loan and self-employment assistanc
verbatim: When expatriates have to return due to law and order problems in foreign countries, a loan and self-employment assistance program will be developed with financial institutions with flexible terms in a manner that will benefit their continued lives.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The activities of the Language Institute, Malayalam University, and the Children's Literature Institute will be expanded
verbatim: The activities of the Language Institute, Malayalam University, and the Children's Literature Institute will be expanded to address the shortage of scholarly books and children's literature.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: In order to ensure the spread of reading in the society, the project "One Book for Every Child" will be implemented to i
verbatim: In order to ensure the spread of reading in the society, the project "One Book for Every Child" will be implemented to instill a love of reading in Malayalam among children in public schools and to create classroom libraries.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Necessary amendments will be made to the Library Act to utilize the potential of information technology and new media. A
verbatim: Necessary amendments will be made to the Library Act to utilize the potential of information technology and new media. A complete reading movement like the complete literacy movement will be initiated to transform the library into a place where one can directly interact with information and communication through the power of information technology. The grant for libraries will be increased three times the current amount. The honorarium of librarians will be increased to a level that is conducive to a fair living. A special scheme will be formulated to digitize rare books in libraries.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The conditions necessary for the cultivation of art in schools will be strengthened. Art teachers will be appointed in g
verbatim: The conditions necessary for the cultivation of art in schools will be strengthened. Art teachers will be appointed in government schools. The manual and management methods of school art festivals will be radically revised. They will be made cheaper, decentralized, and less competitive. Schemes will be devised to turn schools into centers for art education in the evenings and on holidays.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Sahitya Akademi will be reorganized on the lines of Kendra Sahitya Akademi. Grants should be given to local literary com
verbatim: Sahitya Akademi will be reorganized on the lines of Kendra Sahitya Akademi. Grants should be given to local literary committees. Welfare schemes should be started for writers. Translations into other languages ​​will be made possible here and there. Literary festivals will be organized in Kerala in a manner different from the traditional methods.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The Folklore Academy will be enabled for formal and informal research. A spacious and well-equipped Folklore Museum will
verbatim: The Folklore Academy will be enabled for formal and informal research. A spacious and well-equipped Folklore Museum will be established. Funds will be made available to organize music and drama festivals in major centers of Kerala.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A permanent venue will be created for the Thiruvananthapuram Film Festival. Financial assistance to film societies will
verbatim: A permanent venue will be created for the Thiruvananthapuram Film Festival. Financial assistance to film societies will be increased, and the government will provide financial assistance to local film festivals. Permanent galleries will be set up in major cities of the state. Financial assistance will be provided to painters for painting exhibitions. Financial assistance to the Kochi Biennale will continue.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The government will provide financial assistance to art societies and clubs. A special cell will be formed in the Kerala
verbatim: The government will provide financial assistance to art societies and clubs. A special cell will be formed in the Kerala Sangeetha Nataka Akademi to help them get assistance from central academies, etc. Special financial assistance will be provided to art societies to present unique plays. Documentation will be made an important task of the Kerala Sangeetha Nataka Akademi.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: An opportunity will be created to learn about the unique culture, history and life of Kerala. For this purpose, a scheme
verbatim: An opportunity will be created to learn about the unique culture, history and life of Kerala. For this purpose, a scheme for cultural corridors will be formulated in the form of public spaces that can create public awareness through art, science and education.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The activities of the Kalamandalam will be expanded and reformed.
verbatim: The activities of the Kalamandalam will be expanded and reformed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: A network of museums will be established based on multi-layered, innovative perspectives.
verbatim: A network of museums will be established based on multi-layered, innovative perspectives.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The welfare fund for local journalists will be made effective.
verbatim: The welfare fund for local journalists will be made effective.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The state's journalism courses will be given a common format. The state's history and culture will be included in the su
verbatim: The state's journalism courses will be given a common format. The state's history and culture will be included in the subjects of study. The curriculum will be reorganized with the view that journalism is social work.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Media literacy will be included in the curriculum from the upper primary level onwards.
verbatim: Media literacy will be included in the curriculum from the upper primary level onwards.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The State Government will undertake the development of infrastructure for media studies as a duty. For this purpose, pub
verbatim: The State Government will undertake the development of infrastructure for media studies as a duty. For this purpose, public archives of all media products held by organizations and individuals in libraries and institutions will be created. These will be converted into a reference system for students, researchers and those interested in knowledge.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Separate departments for media studies will be started in universities. Undergraduate and postgraduate courses will be i
verbatim: Separate departments for media studies will be started in universities. Undergraduate and postgraduate courses will be implemented in this field.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Digital Kerala Network will be established using the electricity board's poles. Within five years, internet connection w
verbatim: Digital Kerala Network will be established using the electricity board's poles. Within five years, internet connection will be provided to households for Rs. 100, small businesses for Rs. 300, and industrial establishments for Rs. 1000. verbatim: a decentralized and effective system will be introduced at the secretariat level in the form of a directorate like the central government. As part of this, any difficulties faced by the employees will be resolved.

title_en: Administrative procedures will be comprehensively reformed.
verbatim: Administrative procedures will be comprehensively reformed.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Information technology will be utilized to the maximum extent to make the administration more transparent and efficient.
verbatim: Information technology will be utilized to the maximum extent to make the administration more transparent and efficient. Regulatory reforms will be introduced with a focus on e-governance and m-governance.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: The system of writing questions and returning them will be abolished and a system will be established to resolve doubts
verbatim: The system of writing questions and returning them will be abolished and a system will be established to resolve doubts and objections through secure e-mail. Service centers will be established to provide services required by the people. All government department services will be made available at these service centers. A system will be created to monitor these centers to reduce corruption.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: A PTD (Proposal to Disposal) system will be established in a prescribed manner. Once an initiative is proposed, it will be implemented within 6 days of approval. The target of "daily" will be implemented.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: System for translating proceedings up to the District Court into Malayalam Vacancies in the judiciary will be filled to dispose of cases quickly.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Obsolete laws will be repealed and others will be revised. The proposals put forward for this purpose will be examined u
verbatim: Obsolete laws will be repealed and others will be revised. The proposals put forward for this purpose will be examined urgently and all those that can be accepted as policy will be implemented in a timely manner. The Ministry of Law will prepare a five-year action plan for this.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: The Civil Rights Protection Act will be passed. Full civil rights will be ensured for marginalized communities and women.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: There have been complaints regarding some of the existing restrictions on the establishment of places of worship. They will be examined and a solution will be found.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: A mechanism will be put in place to resolve all complaints and issues at the government level within 30 days. If any complaints or demands are rejected, a committee with public participation will be formed to ensure a fair resolution and provide clarity.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

verbatim: A comprehensive law will be passed covering the rights of domestic workers, working conditions, social security, prevention of exploitation, etc.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Family courts will be established in all taluks. Environmental courts/tribunals will be started.
verbatim: Family courts will be established in all taluks. Environmental courts/tribunals will be started.

updates.note_en: Included in the LDF election manifesto.

title_en: Healthy labor relations will be developed. Strict action will be taken against unhealthy trends like nokkukooli. The Lef
verbatim: Healthy labor relations will be developed. Strict action will be taken against unhealthy trends like nokkukooli. The Left's approach will be against the proposed labor law amendments of the central government. The Democratic Front will take over the government. Labor laws will be revised and employment and income will be ensured for the working poor.
